ast.name: error
ast.source: OpenAI API rate limit exceeded. If you have free account, your credits may have been consumed or expired.
ast.target: OpenAI API 请求频率超限。如果您使用的是免费账户，您的额度可能已用尽或已过期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the GPT model to use.
ast.target: 选择要使用的 GPT 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API key to use when making requests - Get from OpenAI
ast.target: 用于发起请求的 API 密钥 - 从 OpenAI 获取

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens to send (within model limit). 0 means as many as possible
ast.target: 发送的最大 token 数量（在模型限制内）。0 表示尽可能多。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens to return from the API. 0 means no limit. (A token is about 4 characters).
ast.target: 从 API 返回的最大 token 数量。0 表示无限制。（一个 token 大约 4 个字符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum depth of ancestor notes to include. 0 means no limit.
ast.target: 要包含的祖先笔记的最大深度。0 表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The chat completions URL to use. You probably won't need to change this.
ast.target: 要使用的聊天补全 URL。您可能不需要更改此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug output in the console
ast.target: 在控制台启用调试输出

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your OpenAI API key in the plugin settings
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置您的 OpenAI API 密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Empty or unreadable response from GPT
ast.target: 来自 GPT 的响应为空或无法读取
